listening.description: Understand simple daily phrases and short sentences

reading.description: Read simple sentences with known characters

speaking.description: Say basic greetings and introduce self

writing.description: Write basic characters (not assessed in system)

listening.description: Understand short conversations on familiar topics

reading.description: Read short paragraphs with mostly known vocabulary

speaking.description: Participate in simple conversations about daily life

writing.description: Write short messages and notes (not assessed in system)

listening.description: Understand conversations at near-normal speed on everyday topics

reading.description: Read newspaper articles and short essays with some dictionary use

speaking.description: Express opinions and describe experiences in connected sentences

writing.description: Write short essays on familiar topics (not assessed in system)

grammar: 不但...而且 not only...but also

listening.description: Understand extended discourse on concrete and some abstract topics

reading.description: Read articles on general topics with good comprehension

speaking.description: Discuss a range of topics with some fluency

writing.description: Write structured paragraphs with clear organization (not assessed in system)

grammar: 与其...不如 rather than...better to
之所以...是因为 the reason...is because

listening.description: Understand lectures and media on most topics

speaking.description: Present arguments and negotiate in professional settings

writing.description: Write formal reports and analytical texts (not assessed in system)

listening.description: Understand native speech in all contexts including nuance and humor

reading.description: Read literature and specialized texts with near-native comprehension

speaking.description: Communicate fluently and spontaneously in any situation

writing.description: Write complex texts with sophisticated style (not assessed in system)

grammar: 不仅...反而 not only not...but instead
非但...反而 not only not...but on the contrary
无论如何 no matter what
以免 in order to avoid

listening.description: Understand rapid native speech on specialized topics including implicit meaning

reading.description: Read specialized academic and literary texts with full comprehension

speaking.description: Present complex arguments with appropriate register and rhetorical structure

writing.description: Write research papers and formal analyses (not assessed in system)

grammar: 纵然 even if / even though
鉴于 in view of / considering
有鉴于此 in light of this

listening.description: Understand all varieties of spoken Chinese including dialectal influence and archaic reference

reading.description: Read classical-influenced texts, legal documents, and literary criticism

speaking.description: Communicate with near-native precision including cultural allusion and stylistic nuance

writing.description: Write stylistically sophisticated texts across genres (not assessed in system)

grammar: 岂非 isn't it / rhetorical question
莫非 could it be that
姑且 for the time being

listening.description: Native-level comprehension across all registers, dialects, and historical periods

reading.description: Read any Chinese text including classical Chinese, specialized jargon, and literary allusion

speaking.description: Native-equivalent fluency with full command of register, allusion, and rhetorical devices

writing.description: Write at native-equivalent level across all genres and registers (not assessed in system)
